task_completion.description: Open and read the DNC opt-out requests file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file manager window displaying the contents of 'dnc_optout_requests.txt' with phone numbers visible.

task_completion.description: Log into the Vicidial admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the Vicidial admin login screen with credentials entered, or the Vicidial Administration dashboard is visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the DNC management section in Vicidial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Add Number To DNC' page or the DNC list management section, typically accessed via the 'Lists' menu.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone numbers into the DNC form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Phone numbers from the text file are seen being typed or pasted into the DNC addition input field(s) in the Vicidial web interface.

task_completion.description: Confirm that the 10 numbers were successfully added to the Internal DNC list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message in the Vicidial interface indicating the numbers were added, or a view of the Internal DNC list displaying the newly added phone numbers.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with Vicidial.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and actively navigating the Vicidial admin pages, rather than using curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual numbers from the specified text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers entered into the Vicidial DNC form match the numbers visible in the 'dnc_optout_requests.txt' file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL insert commands or scripts modifying the vicidial_dnc table directly.
